title: astragalus frigidus subsp. secundus
intro: Astragalus frigidus subsp. secundus is a plant species in the pea family, known as a type of legume. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Astragalus frigidus subsp. secundus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
